title: Debug assertion sqlite3VdbeExec: Assertion `pIn1!=pIn3' failed (2)
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 TEXT, CHECK(c0 BETWEEN 0 AND +c0));
key_bug_features: UPDATE triggers assertion error with CHECK constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c2 TEXT, CHECK(c2 IS NOT NULL);
UPDATE t2 SET c2 = NULL WHERE c2 = 'test';
